title: Service and repair chainsaw cutting systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service and repair chainsaw cutting systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to service and repair chainsaw cutting system

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace service and repair procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace service and repair procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace service and repair procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to service and repair chainsaw cutting system

elements.title: Determine service and repair requirements of chainsaw cutting system

pcs.text: Inspect chainsaw cutting system and test according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Identify faults through inspection and identify causes2.3 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect chainsaw cutting system and test according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Identify faults through inspection and identify causes2.3 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect chainsaw cutting system and test according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Identify faults through inspection and identify causes2.3 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine service and repair requirements of chainsaw cutting system

elements.title: Carry out service and repair activities

pcs.text: Determine service and repair options and select appropriate methods3.2 Select and inspect tools, equipment and materials 3.3 Remove components and inspect for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine service and repair options and select appropriate methods3.2 Select and inspect tools, equipment and materials 3.3 Remove components and inspect for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine service and repair options and select appropriate methods3.2 Select and inspect tools, equipment and materials 3.3 Remove components and inspect for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out service and repair activities

elements.title: Check chainsaw cutting system for normal operation

pcs.text: Operate and compare system to manufacturer specifications according to workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Adjust chainsaw cutting system as required and re-test system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate and compare system to manufacturer specifications according to workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Adjust chainsaw cutting system as required and re-test system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate and compare system to manufacturer specifications according to workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Adjust chainsaw cutting system as required and re-test system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Check chainsaw cutting system for normal operation

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
